reviews.comment:
Pedí un capuchino me lo sirvieron en un jarrito de café con 3 kilos de chocolate le reclamo y me dice que ellos lo preparan así, desayuno siempre en las YPF y nunca tengo inconvenientes con lo que pido, pero este lugar deja mucho de desear

(Translated by Google)
I ordered a cappuccino and they served it to me in a small coffee pot with three kilos of chocolate. I complained and they told me that's how they prepare it. I always have breakfast at YPF stations and I never have problems with what I order, but this place leaves much to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdjlEVUNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Unos estafadores. Nunca les funciona el sistema, no te dan factura, no te cargan puntos serviclub, y encima la nafta carisma.

(Translated by Google)
They're scammers. Their system never works, they don't give you a receipt, they don't credit your Serviclub points, and on top of that, the gas is ridiculously expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCeDYzNU1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Cuenta con lugar de descanso detrás de la estación de servicio, con mesas, parrilla, canilla, hamacas para niños, buena sombra... Lo recomiendo para parar a desayunar, almorzar o merendar en camino a un viaje. La estación de servicio completa con servicio de bar y baños.

(Translated by Google)
It has a rest area behind the gas station, with tables, a grill, a tap, hammocks for children, and good shade. I recommend it for a stop for breakfast, lunch, or a snack on the way to a trip. The gas station also includes a bar and restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCLTVHUHR3RRAB
